title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 10–11, this part focuses on Five Elders, Unknown person #10, Kizaru, Emeth, Unknown person #11, Vegapunk as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I worked out where the broadcast snail is!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Without a doubt! I'm a vegapunk, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Emeth
dialogue.text: The Iron Giant is guarding it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure they knew our entire lost history... so why?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would they just fade away without telling a soul?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm old and washed up now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... just like vegapunk here... A blabbering old geezer who's already said too much.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Don't be an ass and take it away from the youngsters!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The thrill is theirs to seek now...

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
